# iru_tag (Resource)

Manages an Iru Tag, used to organize and scope devices, blueprints, and library items.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iru_tag" "engineering" {
  name = "Engineering"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the tag.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the tag.
